title: General recommendation
recommendation: Review code patterns for optimal structure. Affected files: docker-compose.yml.

title: Docker Compose Multi-Container Orchestration
recommendation: Use compose depends_on rules to control container startup orders and check service healthiness. Affected files: docker-compose.yml.

title: CrewAI Multi-Agent Coordination Framework
recommendation: Configure agent memory options and use clean LLM integration hooks to keep agents deterministic. Affected files: backend/test_task.py, backend/test_crew.py, backend/scratch/test_llm.py.

title: Dockerfile / Container deployment recipe
recommendation: Use multi-stage builds to reduce image size and run containers as non-root users for security. Affected files: backend/intelligence/models.py.

title: SQLAlchemy Declarative Database Schema Model
recommendation: Ensure columns with high search volumes have indexes (index=True) and declare proper relationships. Affected files: backend/intelligence/models.py.

title: Environment variable retrieval configuration
recommendation: Centralize all env var access in a settings configuration file and validate with Pydantic. Affected files: backend/main.py.

title: Python Backend Application Source File
recommendation: Adhere to PEP 8 style guidelines and include function docstrings and type hints. Affected files: backend/intelligence/models.py.

title: TypeScript Static Typing Definition File
recommendation: Enforce strict type checking in tsconfig.json and avoid using the 'any' type. Affected files: backend/intelligence/models.py.

title: Pytest Test Suite Integration
recommendation: Structure tests cleanly under a tests/ folder and write fixtures to share test setup code. Affected files: backend/intelligence/models.py.

title: React.js Client Framework Integration
recommendation: Structure UI components under a components/ directory and manage state hooks predictably. Affected files: backend/intelligence/models.py.

title: Tailwind Utility-First CSS Framework Configurations
recommendation: Keep tailwind configs customized and purge unused styles in production configurations. Affected files: backend/intelligence/models.py.
